11023.title: Ghosts : Who Do You Think You Are?

11024.title: This Time with Alan Partridge
11024.description: A special programme focusing on the delicate issue of the `MeToo' movement and a chance for Alan to show off his broadcasting chops. Also featuring a live performance by Alan's very own mixed vocal harmony group, The Quavers.

11026.title: Friday Night Dinner : The Other Jackie
11026.description: Brothers Adam and Jonny are horrified to find Mum and Dad in a hot tub in the garden, drinking champagne. Neighbour Jim arrives to ask them if they can look after Wilson because his sister, who's terrified of dogs, is coming to visit.

11027.title: Semi-Detached
11027.description: Stuart and the family rush to the hospital to be by the bedside of Stuart's dad Willie. Needle-phobic Stu is asked to have a blood test, and a drunk Ted tries to make things better with his wife Kate.

11028.title: Antiques Roadshow : Aerospace Bristol 2
11028.description: Discoveries include a four-leaf clover brooch which brings luck to its owner, as well as a collection of Radiohead memorabilia. A former Concorde pilot reminisces about the celebrity passengers he used to fly across the Atlantic.

11029.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build : Hessle
11029.description: In Hessle, near Hull, Nick, the team, and hundreds of kind volunteers step up to help roofer Darren and his sons. He was married to childhood love Sarah, and is dad to Harvey, step-dad to Mike and adopted dad to Oliver who is severely disabled.
11029.category: Home & Garden, Doe-het-zelf, Bouwen en verbouwen, Kunstnijverheid

11033.title: Call the Midwife
11033.description: A disease outbreak brings back bad memories for Patsy, while Sister Winifred is forced to reconsider her prejudices when dealing with a mother-to-be. Barbara faces a dilemma when Tom asks her to dinner.

11034.title: Call the Midwife
11034.description: The pressures of modern Britain reach Poplar as a hospital secondment and a difficult birth raise moral questions for Sister Julienne. Trixie and Tom help a family breaking apart under the pressure of a son's dreams for the future.

11037.title: Doctors : The Truth, the Whole Truth...

11038.title: Doctors : Push
11038.description: Ruhma supports one couple from the start to the end of their pregnancy journey, but must admit that she needs help herself.

11039.title: EastEnders
11039.description: There's an incident at the gym when Linda pushes herself too hard. Iqra supports Mila as she stands up for what she believes, and Kheerat must make a change to keep on Ben's good side.

11043.title: Impossible
11043.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

11044.title: Impossible
11044.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

11045.title: Doctor Who : Spyfall
11045.description: Intelligence agents around the world are under attack from alien forces, so MI6 turn to the only people who can help: the Doctor and friends. As they travel the globe looking for answers, attacks come from all sides. Earth's security rests on the team's shoulders, but where will this planet-threatening conspiracy lead them?

11046.title: Father Brown : The Sins of Others
11046.description: Father Brown struggles to save Sid from himself when he vows vengeance on his former defence barrister.

11053.title: Call the Midwife
11053.description: Valerie tries to help a struggling mother to accept her son's birth defect, and the Turners oversee a measles vaccination trial at the clinic. Meanwhile, Nurse Crane is determined to make the most of the Whitsun bank holiday.

11054.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators : In My Memory Lock'd
11054.description: Frank and Lu have a mystery to solve when a man with no recollection of who he is or where he came from wanders into their lives.

11055.title: Sanditon
11055.description: Charlotte and Sidney clash again, only for Charlotte to be left confused by a chance encounter. Tensions surrounding Miss Lambe's arrival in Sanditon erupt at Lady Denham's luncheon, and Esther and Edward realise that Clara poses a threat.

11056.title: The Kettering Incident : Anna
11056.description: Anna Macy left Kettering when she was just 14, shortly after her best friend disappeared in the forest. When Anna returns 15 years later, the town is struggling to survive.
